💬 Contact Us
TRUSTED BY 500+ INDONESIAN BUSINESSES

Your Competitors Already Use AI. When Will You?

Businesses still running 100% manual will lose within 2 years. BerkahKarya turbocharges your sales, makes operations smarter, and automates everything — while cutting operational costs by up to 60% with AI Agents working for you 24/7.

Free Consultation →See Demo
✓Setup <5 menit
✓Garansi 7 hari
✓Support via Telegram

If your business still operates like this, you're already behind.

😩

Making 1 video takes 3 days + $300. Your competitors upload 10 videos a week using AI.

💸

Ad budget exhausted but ROAS under 2x. No idea which creative actually converts.

😴

Customer texts at 11 PM unanswered. By morning, the lead went to your competitor.

📊

Business decisions still based on "gut feeling". No real-time data for fast decisions.

All these problems have one solution: AI working for you 24/7.

One Ecosystem. Every AI Solution.

01

AI Creative Studio

Video, ads, and visual content — 10x faster, 90% cheaper than production houses.

02

AI Business Agents

Customer service, sales follow-up, and data processing — fully automated without extra employees.

03

AI Trading & Data

Trading algorithms and real-time analytics — data-driven decisions, not gut feelings.

1Ai
398 AI Models — $5/Month Flat

One endpoint for GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Llama, and 393+ models. Auto-failover, save 70% on API costs.

  • ✓398 AI models vs OpenRouter's 200
  • ✓Auto-failover in 50ms — zero downtime
  • ✓Local payment (GoPay/OVO/DANA), Telegram support
Starting from$5/month flat
Try Free →

Company profile, ads, explainer, and social media video production. AI team + professional videographers for production house quality.

Security Audit
Security Audit Before Hackers Find It

Penetration testing for websites, APIs, and infrastructure. OWASP Top 10, detailed vulnerability reports, free retest for 30 days.

  • ✓OWASP Top 10: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF & more
  • ✓Detailed report with CVSS score + proof of exploit
  • ✓Free retest 30 days after remediation
From Rp 1M/audit
Free Consultation →
🔍
Deep Research

Competitor, market, industry research and business data analysis. Structured reports with validated data, not opinions. Data-driven decisions.

  • ✓Competitor, market, and industry research
  • ✓Validated sources: reports, journals, primary data
  • ✓Executive-ready report + presentation deck
From Rp 500K/research

📝 Blog & Insights

Latest Articles & Tips

🎬AI Tools

Cara Bikin Video TikTok Viral Tanpa Skill Editing — Cukup Upload Foto

Platform reward konten bergerak 4x lebih tinggi dari foto statis. Begini cara bisnis kecil bisa produksi 10 video/hari dengan biaya Rp 8K per video.

20 Mar 2026Read more →
📢Digital Marketing

ROAS Kamu Jelek Bukan Karena Budget — Tapi Karena Copywriting yang Salah

80% kegagalan iklan bukan soal budget atau targeting. Ini tentang formula copywriting yang missing. 5 elemen iklan yang converting vs yang tidak.

17 Mar 2026Read more →
🤖AI Automation

Kenapa 65% Lead Hilang Setiap Hari dan Cara Stop Itu Terjadi

Lead kirim WA jam 11 malam. CS offline. Pagi-pagi mereka sudah beli di kompetitor. Ini angka-angka yang mengejutkan tentang respons time dan revenue yang hilang.

14 Mar 2026Read more →
📈Trading

7-Candle Breakout Protocol C: Strategi XAUUSD yang Bisa Dijalankan Sambil Kerja

Entry jam 15:00 WIB, 5 menit setup, sisanya sistem yang kerja. Kenapa Asia session adalah window terbaik untuk trader Indonesia yang punya day job.

10 Mar 2026Read more →
